hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.jsx ]] || [[ "$f" == *.js ]] || [[ "$f" == *.css ]] && cd /Users/nikollasanches/Documents/petlife && npm run build --silent 2>&1 | tail -3; } 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.prompt:
You are a QA verification agent for PetLife. Before this session ends, verify:

1. Run `npm run build` in ~/Documents/petlife/ — does it pass?
2. If code was changed, check that the API is still healthy: `curl -sf https://petlife-api-production-d707.up.railway.app/health`
3. If any React hooks were created or modified in src/hooks/, verify they all use `.then(r => r.data)` pattern (grep for queryFn and mutationFn without .then)
4. If Onboarding.jsx was modified, verify the species is sent as uppercase (DOG/CAT) and dates as ISO strings

Report what you found. If there are issues, output JSON: {"continue":false,"stopReason":"Found issues: <details>"}
If all good, output: {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"QA passed: build ok, API healthy, hooks consistent"}}

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"PRESERVE: PetLife project context — Backend API at petlife-api-production-d707.up.railway.app, Frontend at amusing-creativity-production-295a.up.railway.app. React Query hooks MUST use .then(r => r.data). API returns { data: ... } format. Carolina (sócia) P0/P1 features. Auth uses refreshToken in body (not cookies). PetProvider only mounts after auth."}'
